title: nf-core/pgdia pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

bam.errorMessage: Aligned reads must be provided as a coordinate-sorted BAM file ending with '.bam' and without spaces in the path

bai.errorMessage: If a BAM is supplied, provide the matching BAI index ending with '.bam.bai'

cram.errorMessage: CRAM file should end with `.cram`, should not contains spaces and should exist.

crai.errorMessage: CRAI file should end with `.crai`, should not contains spaces and should exist.

vcf.errorMessage: VCF file should end with `.vcf.gz`, should not contains spaces and should exist.

tbi.errorMessage: TBI file should end with `.vcf.gz.tbi`, should not contains spaces and should exist.

dia_raw.description: Path to DIA-MS raw data file or directory (e.g. .d for timsTOF)
dia_raw.errorMessage: DIA RAW file should end with `.d` or '.RAW', should not contains spaces and should exist.
